research_notes: Found executive information on company profile page. Executives include President & Representative Director 矢花 達也, Director & Senior Managing Executive Officer 伊藤 瑞穂, Director 野沢 勝則, and Auditor 田代 昭臣. Also lists multiple Executive Officers (Managing Executive Officers and Senior Executive Officers). Company has 294 employees as of April 2026, 100% owned by IG Holdings.
